title: Fried Tomato Croatian Stew
description: A diabetic-friendly and energizing twist on the classic tomato stew featuring a crispy fried tomato topping that is both gooey and fermented.
instructions: Chop the tomatoes into small cubes.
Slice the onion and mince the garlic.
Saute the chopped onions in olive oil until translucent, then add minced garlic. Cook for another minute.
Add tomato cubes, salt, pepper, and enough water to cover the mixture by 1 inch (2.5 cm). Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce heat to low-medium, partially cover, and simmer gently for about 20-30 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed and tomatoes are soft.
While the stew simmers, prepare the fried tomato topping: Place chopped tomatoes in a skillet with olive oil. Sauté over medium-high heat, tossing occasionally, until they start to brown and soften.
Once the stew is ready, stir in some of the cooked tomatoes from the skillet for an extra burst of flavor. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot on its own or with crusty bread.
